facts.text: Inception was directed by Christopher Nolan.
The movie Inception received awards including Best Cinematography.
Christopher Nolan also directed Memento and The Dark Knight.
The cinematographer for Inception was Wally Pfister.
Dunkirk won several technical awards in 2018.
Interstellar was released in 2014 and features cinematography by Hoyte van Hoytema.
Python is a programming language that emphasizes readability.
FAISS is a library for similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.
Ollama is a local LLM host that can run models via a CLI.
